setup_lede: Choose a procedure, enter your details, and begin when you're ready.
load_error: Couldn't load the procedure list. If you opened this file directly on your computer, it needs to be served from a web server instead — check with IT that the folder (including the "procedures" subfolder) is published on the intranet server.
setup_error: Please choose a procedure and enter your name and date to continue.
quiz_error: Please answer every question before submitting.
result_pass_sub_template: Well done — you've met the {passMark}% pass mark for {docRef}.
result_fail_sub_template: You need {passMark}% to pass. Review the procedure and try again.
cert_body_template: has successfully completed the {docRef} knowledge test on {title}, demonstrating the required understanding of the procedure.
content_not_translated_notice: This procedure isn't translated into this language yet — showing English instead.
